◆ INSTKEYWORD

#define INSTKEYWORD ( STR,
Enum )
Value:
if (Len == strlen(#STR) && !memcmp(StartChar, #STR, strlen(#STR))) { \
UIntVal = Instruction::Enum; return lltok::kw_##STR; }

◆ KEYWORD

#define KEYWORD ( STR)
Value:
do { \
if (Len == strlen(#STR) && !memcmp(StartChar, #STR, strlen(#STR))) \
return lltok::kw_##STR; \
} while (0)

◆ TYPEKEYWORD

#define TYPEKEYWORD ( STR,
LLVMTY )
Value:
if (Len == strlen(STR) && !memcmp(StartChar, STR, strlen(STR))) { \
TyVal = LLVMTY; return lltok::Type; }
